today.name: CREOSOTE
today.nextAction: v0.4.68 — METER BULB GLOW (user ref: API console VUs — faces glow warm amber from the bulb, hot centre, dark edges): lit faces re-baked with a spherical-gradient emission in the card Generated space (amber 1.0/0.58/0.24, centre boost 1.2, edge floor 0.15; GOTCHA: zero the mapping Z scale or the un-centred z pushes the gradient length past 1 and the falloff silently dies flat). PREVIOUS: v0.4.67 — LEVEL RAISED TO THE REFERENCE MOCKUP (user: v0.4.66 still too dark overall vs the approved mockup crop): L8 key energy 160 -> 250 (the earlier iteration measured 250 = 0.078 panel luma, even to +-9%, matching the reference image level); all 8 plates + all 16 sprites re-baked; EQ scene synced. One number, whole pipeline. PREVIOUS: v0.4.66 — METER BULB BACKLIGHT (user: v0.4.65 dim look = the OFF state; ON should glow bulb-backlit like the reference meters): 3 lit companion faces baked (meterface_lit_*, same ivory card + warm emission, --faceglow 1.0 locked after 1.4 read blown); ParamSlider crossfades unlit -> lit by lampFrac (litOn ? 0.82 + heat*0.18 : 0) so module power throws the bulbs and heat pushes them hotter; room shade fades out as the backlight comes up (a lit card is its own light source). PREVIOUS: v0.4.65 — SLIDERS ARE EDGEWISE METERS (user reference: D-C AMPERES panel meter; mockups SM1 white / SM2 window-in-cap / SM3 aged ivory -> pick SM3 + LARGER labels): slider tiles now draw a blank baked ivory face sprite (meterface_149x44|148x32|126x32, parked in caps mode) with LIVE ink — black scale comb (25 ticks, majors every 4th, small numerals at majors on roomy tiles), printed label bottom-centre silkBold 9/8 (the user asked larger), printed value top-right, bipolar centre index, RED needle (heat warms it toward hot orange; a meter needle is mechanical — no lamp). Whole meter is reflective: light-map shade applied over the finished tile. Selectors keep bronze caps + amber lamps. Legacy lens intact. PREVIOUS: v0.4.64 — L8 EVEN LIGHT AT THE SWEET SPOT (user on L7 in-plugin: better but too bright left, too dark right — GRIT zone is the sweet spot, make it ALL this): L8 = big centred softbox (energy 160, size 11, pos 3.6,-2.2,10) + High Contrast grade + low ambient — measured even to +-8% at the L7 GRIT-zone level (0.048 luma). Tuned by sampling panel title-row points L/C/R across fast bakes. All 8 plates + 10 sprites re-baked; plateShadeFor self-adjusts to ~1 under even light (derives from the plate). PREVIOUS: v0.4.63 — L7 LIGHTING LOCKED (user: washed out, needs contrast -> rounds L1-L7 -> pick: raking spot + Filmic High Contrast, pool tamed 25%; user loves the olive/drab-green/brown cast): ALL plates re-baked (4 chassis + 4 EQ with the rig translated to the panel's console position), all 10 cap sprites re-baked — tile caps at the BRIGHT reference park, header caps at true positions. NEW: EPh::plateShadeFor light map — reflective elements (cap sprites, silk print, carets, cream EQ knobs) dim by the light sampled from the actual baked chassis plate around each component's position (planar fit failed: pool is radial + panel shadows); emissive elements (value lamps, pens, lit lenses, heat) stay bright. Ring-sampled, cached, clamp [0.22,1.08]. PREVIOUS: v0.4.62 — SLIDER TILES: SC2 CHART PEN (mockup rounds: SA track / SB slot / SC ticks -> SC refined to SC1 dial-needle / SC2 chart-pen / SC3 fader-thumb -> pick SC2, VALUE readout moved TOP RIGHT per user): ParamSlider kPlates branch = bronze cap sprite (two new footprints tilecap_148x32|126x32 baked) + silk label top-left + EB::lampText value top-right (heat rides glow) + printed chart scale (hairline baseline, 13 ticks major/minor, centre index on bipolar) + accent hairline pen (identity rule: module accent lives in the pen; heat brightens it; unlit = silk ghost pen). Legacy lit-lens intact behind kPlates. PREVIOUS: v0.4.61 — LIMIT TILE RACE FIX (user: LIMIT still animated in bypass after v0.4.60): limiterGR is the ONE feed stored per-sample inside the audio loop (6 sites), so the 30Hz UI timer could catch a live value mid-callback before the end-of-block zero landed — the LIMIT heat and GR bar kept flickering. The three LIVE stores are now gated on masterBypassOn at the source (the three store-0 sites are harmless). PREVIOUS: v0.4.60 — BYPASS POWERS THE CONSOLE DOWN (user: G/R already stops on bypass, ALL animation should): processBlock end-of-block UI-feed stores gated on masterBypassOn — input/output/limiter levels, limiterGR, true peaks, eqLiveDeltaDb, amberHeat, ageLfoLive all store 0 so needles/bars/lamps/dyn-curve/scope fall to rest through their own ballistics. Audio untouched (atomics only feed the editor); true-peak accumulators still consumed during bypass so no stale spike on unbypass. PREVIOUS: v0.4.59 — MOCKUP MATCH, FOR REAL (root cause of two bad rounds: bpy Image.pixels returns RAW file-encoded sRGB, NOT linear — the sampler applied a second transfer, every sampled colour was phantom-bright, sprites got tuned near-black and the sheen floor never existed). Fixed sampler; true mockup values: cap body #6F5D49, label silk #CFC5B1, value #EBD38D CRISP (no halo — user rejected the glow; lampText halo passes deleted, heat now warms the core toward white). Tile sprites re-baked with the TRUE mockup material (--capbrz 52483B, default specular) + a camera-invisible panel-coloured bounce plane (floating caps on transparent film lost the panel bounce). BYPASS resting mute = per-pixel desaturated cached sprite (alpha preserved) replacing the wash overlay that left red edge slivers. PREVIOUS: v0.4.58 — BYPASS RESTING STATE (user: inactive too close to on): resting red cap gets a 58% warm-dark desat wash (muted brick) + 78% legend; engaged = the vivid full-red sprite latched 1px down, press-darken skipped for the red cap so on-state stays vivid. PREVIOUS: v0.4.57 — SELECTOR CAPS ARE SPRITES (user: color was right in v0.4.55, the DRAWING was wrong vs BYPASS): cap bodies now pre-rendered Blender sprites like the header caps — tilecap_304x44|149x44|124x44|92x32_2x, baked in caps mode with --capbrz 120D08 (tuned so the RENDER = the approved on-screen bronze #564B3D; gotcha: the 5200W key puts a ~#53 specular sheen floor under dark materials — Specular IOR Level cut to 0.03 to get under it). bronzeCap routes the four footprints to sprites, keeps the v0.4.55 procedural as odd-size fallback; v0.4.56 khaki + sampled-silk detour reverted (lamp hues, labels, caret, ghost back to v0.4.55). PREVIOUS: v0.4.56 — SELECTOR CAPS MATCHED TO THE RENDER (user showed v0.4.55 vs mockup side by side: caps shipped several stops too dark, glow too fuzzy — the first cut eyeballed the raw Blender MATERIAL 0x4A4238 instead of the RENDERED pixels; lesson: sample the render). Face #B6A896-#A1937F flat khaki + bevel rim, labels sampled silk #E9E4D9, lamp core #F6EBC4 hot cream with tight halo, dark ink caret, unpowered value = printed silk #DFD6BF. PREVIOUS: v0.4.55 — SELECTOR BRONZE CAPS (user: 'this should be our standard button look' after seeing the H2 caps; mockup pick B of A/B/C): every radio/selector tile (MODE, AUTO REL, MACHINE, WIDTH, TAPE, IPS, CAL, BIAS, AGE, LFO, tubes, ERAs, HARDWARE, IRON) now renders as a chunky dark-bronze pushbutton (EB::bronzeCap — cached body, top catchlight, bottom shadow, hover lift) with the VALUE text as a glowing amber dial lamp (EB::lampText — halo passes + bright core; heat rides the glow exactly as it rode the lens face; lampGreen property = green lamp for engaged toggles; lamp off = silk ghost). Central switch in drawC1SelectorTile/drawC1SelectorText kPlates branches + IronTile; ParamSlider VALUE tiles (with bars) intentionally unchanged — slider rethink is the next round. Legacy lit-lens intact behind kPlates. PREVIOUS: v0.4.54 — HEADER + TABS PHOTOREAL (mockup picks: H2 chunky pushbuttons, T1 narrow lens tabs, STAGING rename; user: legends +20%): chassis plates re-baked with H2 bezel housings at the five header slots + preset readout glass window + 64px-on-68px-pitch tab wells/bezels + STAGING silkscreen (was LIMITER — only LIMIT/AUTO LEVEL are the limiter). New caps bake mode renders the proud cream/red caps as blank alpha sprites (hdrcap_red_60|cream_36|52|64_2x) — legends live (CapButtonLAF silkBold, so HQ reads OFF/2x/4x/8x; press/latch = 1px drop + shade wash; BYPASS=red cap). Tabs: TabLensLAF backlitCap 60x16 lens faces (housing=false), selected lit amber via toggle state, AGE LFO near-dark when disabled. Preset combo under kPlates: baked window, live gold EF::silk(13) text + arrow only. ATK/REL knobs got the FREQ log-skew treatment (geometric mids 10ms/100ms). Legacy painting intact behind kPlates. PREVIOUS: v0.4.53 — FREQ KNOB LOG FEEL (user: 'freq knob still far far too sensitive' after the 300px pass): root cause was NOT sensitivity — OUT_EQ_Bn_FREQ params are LINEAR 20..20k floats, so the SliderAttachment hands the inspector knob a linear range and everything under 2k sits in the first ~10% of rotation (~66 Hz/px near 250 Hz). Fix is UI-only: after every attachment rebuild in bindInspector(), override the FREQ slider's NormalisableRange (20..20k) + setSkewFactorFromMidPoint(632.5) (geometric mid) — uniform ~30px/octave feel; param/automation/presets untouched. PREVIOUS: v0.4.52 — EQ FEEL PASS (user: knobs too twitchy, HPF/LPF always plain): inspector knob drag sensitivity 140 -> 300 px/full-sweep; Q removed from bands 1+8 everywhere it could be edited — inspector Q knob disabled (dims like GAIN) via inspectorSliders[2].setEnabled(useGain), node vertical-drag Q branch deleted (HPF/LPF drag is frequency-only), mouse-wheel Q gated by bandUsesGain. Q params untouched (DSP frozen, presets keep values). PREVIOUS: v0.4.51 — OUTPUT EQ: MACHINE-TOOL CHART PLATE (user's reference: vintage lathe feed-rate nomogram — cream plate, blue graticule, red curves; picks via mockups: EQ-B pre+post display, K3 CREAM knob). SHIPPED: 4 EQ plates baked (Resources/Plates/eq_hybrid|green_1x|2x from creosote_eq_scene.py --mode plates — exact OutputEqPanel geometry 732x210, cream chart at the graph rect (6,34,494,170), graticule at the graph's OWN log-20-20k / +/-18dB mapping so baked lines land under live curves, DejaVu blue labels, screws). OutputEqPanel: panel bg -> theme+scale-selected plate (UI_THEME aware); EqGraph under kPlates skips bg/grime/grid/labels and draws NOMOGRAM INK — blue dashed PRE (staticPts), red POST 2.2px (livePts), dynamic fill red 0.14 (was purple), band nodes = numbered red silkscreen discs with cream numerals (selection = larger disc + dark ring); EqInspectorKnobLAF gained the K3 CREAM path (cream skirt+cap, black pointer, disabled dims; cyan renderer kept for legacy); inspector labels silk cream DejaVu Bold. All legacy painting intact behind kPlates. VERIFY: EQ tab reads as the chart plate; drag bands (red discs), watch dynamics duck the red curve over the blue dashed pre; knobs cream with black pointers; both themes. OPEN: header buttons/tabs polish vs plate; LIMITER rename.
